documents.title: Termination Report (OGE Form 278e)
documents.summary: Final disclosure filed on departure as FAA Administrator, listing termination date of 01/20/2025. Discloses retained holdings in Matternet and ANRA Technologies stock options, a Supernal 401(k), and IRA accounts holding diversified mutual funds and ETFs (Dodge & Cox, Vanguard, DFA, PIMCO, Baron, First Eagle). Spouse holdings include IRA and beneficiary IRA accounts.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses one transaction: a sale of AT&T Inc. on 12/18/2024 in the $1,001 to $15,000 range. Marked No on the 30-day late notification flag.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: No ProPublica appointee page was found in the searchable Trump Team Financial Disclosures index. Whitaker is labeled former in Open Cabinet after departing FAA on January 20, 2025.
